allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/fifa.world/scoreboard?dates=20260611-20260613" -TimeoutSec 20; "EVENTS: $\($r.events.Count\)"; $r.events | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\)  $\($_.name\)  status=$\($_.status.type.state\)/$\($_.status.type.shortDetail\)" } } catch { "ESPN scoreboard FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(cd "/f/FIFA stream And fixtures" && rm -f server/streams.json && echo "streams.json removed")
